name: HGPP
detailed_description:
- .... .. ... -. . . -.. ... - --- -... . ..-. .. -. .. ... .... . -.. .-.-.- .. - .----. ... ..-. .. -. .. ... .... . -.. -... .. ... -. . . -..

HGPP is a single-player horror game.

  • You awake in a dark, pitch-black basement.

  • You are not alone, another person is in the basement. You must not let him find you.

  • Although blind, he can still hear and smell you.

  • The longer you stay in the basement, the wider your scent spreads, making it easier for him to track you.

  • Find a way to escape. There are clues nearby.

- .... .. ... .-- .- ... ..-. --- .-. -.-- --- ..- - .... .. ... .-- .- ... ..-. --- .-. -.-- --- ..- ... .. ... .-- .- ... ..-. --- .-.
